statement: In every magma, Equation 604 (`x = y * (z * (w * (w * y)))`) implies Equation 157 (`x = (x * y) * (x * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0316
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op w (op w y))))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op x y) (op x y))
